mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rn, b.*, m.memberName FROM board2 b INNER JOIN member m ON b.memberNo = m.memberNo ORDER BY b.boardNo DESC ) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{startRow} + #{pageSize} - 1

SELECT count(*) FROM board2 b INNER JOIN member m ON b.memberNo = m.memberNo
m.memberName LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%'
b.title LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%'
b.content LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rn, b.*, m.memberName FROM board2 b INNER JOIN member m ON b.memberNo = m.memberNo
m.memberName LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%'
b.title LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%'
b.content LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%'
ORDER BY b.boardNo DESC ) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{startRow} + #{pageSize} - 1
SELECT b.*, m.memberName FROM board2 b INNER JOIN member m ON b.memberNo = m.memberNo WHERE b.boardNo = #{boardno}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board2 (boardNo, title, content, createDate, memberNo) VALUES (board_seq2.NEXTVAL, #{title}, #{content}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{memberno})
